title: BBC World Service to launch new language offers in Hungarian and Romanian - BBC

title: Delimitation after 2027, redrawing power in India - Vision IAS
summary: India is preparing for a significant redrawing of electoral constituencies through delimitation, expected to commence after 2027. This process will reallocate parliamentary and assembly seats based on population changes, potentially shifting political power dynamics across states.
